epigraph.quote: Charles has been spinning the sheep's wool that we collected & tying a raft of oak twigs.

moments.quote: we reached Worester at 6.43... but just made it running into Big School as the orchestra arrived
John 'cello & voice & Charles euphonium & trombone. Brass band, chamber music, chamber choir & jazz band.
The church has a yew behind 2000 years old.
